reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 3 (Code Verification) triggered. Phase 03 misread the conditional logic at rpc_methods.rs:1029-1039. The code has TWO branches: (1) if data_availability_boundary_slot < oldest_blob_slot → returns ResourceUnavailable (NO penalty); (2) else → returns InvalidRequest (penalty). During FULU fork transition, when blobs from FULU_FORK_EPOCH slots are unavailable because they haven't been stored yet, oldest_blob_slot will be GREATER than data_availability_boundary_slot, triggering branch (1) which returns ResourceUnavailable, NOT InvalidRequest. Therefore, peers are NOT penalized during transition. The 01e invariant from file 01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json lines 806-822 states 'Peers must not be penalized for requesting blob sidecars from FULU_FORK_EPOCH during transition' - the code DOES satisfy this requirement via the ResourceUnavailable path. Phase 03's claim that InvalidRequest would be returned is factually incorrect.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Peers must not be penalized for requesting blob sidecars from FULU_FORK_EPOCH during transition (assertion: forall req at FULU_FORK_EPOCH: peer_score_delta(req.peer) >= 0)
